creator: groot@kde.org
text:
CPU type, ABI information, instruction set support, ...

The point being that our local builds -- with a 10.2 jail, but still with QEMU, configured to build for Beagle Bone Black -- does build without errors, and it runs, too. Here's the top of my build log: I can't see any interesting differences with yours except for the OSVERSION.


====>> Building devel/qmake4
build started at Sat Aug 13 13:02:38 CEST 2016
port directory: /usr/ports/devel/qmake4
building for: FreeBSD bbbbuild 10.2-RELEASE-p2 FreeBSD 10.2-RELEASE-p2 r287145 arm
maintained by: kde@FreeBSD.org
Makefile ident:      $FreeBSD: head/devel/qmake4/Makefile 353040 2014-05-05 20:47:22Z rakuco $
Poudriere version: 3.2-pre
Host OSVERSION: 1003505
Jail OSVERSION: 1002000

---Begin Environment---
OSVERSION=1002000
_JAVA_OS_LIST_REGEXP=native\|linux
PACKAGE_BUILDING=yes
LOCALBASE=/usr/local
LIBEXECPREFIX=/usr/local/libexec/poudriere
CONFIGURE_MAX_CMD_LEN=262144
SCRIPTPATH=/usr/local/share/poudriere/bulk.sh
POUDRIERE_VERSION=3.2-pre
HOME=/root
USER=root
_JAVA_VENDOR_LIST_REGEXP=openjdk\|oracle\|sun
SCRIPTPREFIX=/usr/local/share/poudriere
MASTERNAME=101armv6-default
PWD=/usr/local/poudriere/data/.m/101armv6-default/ref/.p/pool
_SMP_CPUS=8
OLDPWD=/
PYTHONBASE=/usr/local
_OSRELEASE=10.2-RELEASE-p2
OSREL=10.2
PKGNAME=qt4-qmake-4.8.7
POUDRIERE_BUILD_TYPE=bulk
_JAVA_VERSION_LIST_REGEXP=1.6\|1.7\|1.8\|1.6+\|1.7+\|1.8+
PATH=/sbin:/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/usr/games:/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/root/bin
FORCE_PACKAGE=yes
QEMU_EMULATING=1
MASTERMNT=/usr/local/poudriere/data/.m/101armv6-default/ref
PYTHON_PORTVERSION=2.7.11
SAVED_TERM=xterm
ARCH=armv6
OPSYS=FreeBSD
STATUS=1
MAIL=/var/mail/root
BLOCKSIZE=K
UNAME_r=10.2-RELEASE-p2
UNAME_v=FreeBSD 10.2-RELEASE-p2 r287145
ABI_FILE=/usr/lib/crt1.o
UNAME_m=arm
UNAME_p=armv6
SHELL=/bin/csh
---End Environment---
